title: Create OnboardingHome component — oversized START button navigating to /reception/onboarding/qrcode
acceptance_criteria: Single START button centred on screen with play icon (pi pi-play)
Button has 8vh font size and 16vh height for oversized touch target
Uses inject() pattern, no constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: OnboardingHome created: full-screen centred layout, oversized ▶ START button (8vh font, 16vh height, #238cff) navigates to /reception/onboarding/qrcode. OnPush, inject(), no standalone:true.
